regions.name: Station Ring
regions.description: A silent orbital platform, powerless for months. Emergency strips glow a dim amber down every corridor, and the whole ring turns slowly against the stars.

environmentalCodes.description: Spin gravity at a fraction of a g — footfalls float, thrown objects drift.
Recyclers are down; the air is cold, stale, and getting worse.

nodes.name: Docking Ring
nodes.description: The airlock bay where Vega's cutter is clamped on. Cargo nets and dead loaders line the walls; a bulkhead leads inward.

nodes.name: Corridor C
nodes.description: A long service corridor of exposed conduit and floating debris. Something with servos is moving at the far end.

nodes.name: Reactor Core
nodes.description: The heart of the station, where the log Vega came for is stored. The containment is cracked, and the core bleeds radiation into the room.

environmentalCodes.description: The breached core floods the chamber with hard radiation — every second here costs.
